title: Man shot dead in Blanco
description: GEORGE NEWS - A man was shot dead in Crystal...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GEORGE NEWS - A man was shot dead in Crystal Avenue, Blanco, this afternoon, Sunday 13 April at around 17:00.


> Police have secured the scene where hundreds of community members have congregated, some already wearing gowns and slippers.


Relatives of the man who spoke to George Herald on condition of anonymity said the deceased was not a troublemaker, and they had no idea what the motive for the shooting may have been.

Read more in the print edition, out this week on Wednesday due to the Easter weekend.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
